title: Weekly status report — fill RAG, %, and updates
prompt: Fill the weekly status template from data.json — RAG dropdown, % complete, and update text per workstream.

files.note: Workstream labels, a RAG data-validation dropdown ('please select'), an 'X%' percent placeholder, and a '[Leave blank]' text cell (synthetic sample).
4 workstream fills; exercises dropdown coercion + percent number_format + free text.
